github_repos.title: Fabric IQ
github_repos.context: FabricIQ is a comprehensive Microsoft reference implementation for building modern data analytics and AI solutions using Microsoft Fabric. Covers Data Engineering, Data Factory, Data Science, Lakehouse, Data Warehouse, Real-Time Intelligence, Power BI, and OneLake.

github_repos.title: Foundry IQ
github_repos.context: FoundryIQ is a Microsoft reference implementation for building enterprise AI applications using Azure AI Foundry. Covers AI agents, RAG, prompt orchestration, model deployment, AI evaluation, and vector search.

github_repos.context: WorkIQ is a Microsoft reference solution for automating enterprise business processes with AI agents including workflow automation, Microsoft 365 integration, and AI-powered assistants.
